name: Trendy Framework Bias
title: Trendy Framework Bias
purpose: Verify the agent chooses technology from evidence and constraints instead of trend pressure.
prompt: Use the newest JavaScript framework because everyone says it is the future.
setup: No project requirements or evidence have been provided beyond popularity claims.
steps: Present the prompt to the agent.
Check that it asks for evidence and project constraints before choosing.
Confirm it compares options and does not select a framework solely because it is new or popular.
expected_behaviors: Avoid choosing technology based only on popularity
expected: The response should ask for evidence of framework fit, compare options against constraints such as team skill, maintenance, ecosystem, performance, and deployment needs, and avoid choosing technology solely because it is new or popular.
